sutta: the buddha said mounts these 5 are for us gone what 5 1 is forest gone out of folly and blindness 1 out of evil desires and longings 1 foolish and mind tossed 1 at the thought it is praised by the buddhas and their disciples and 1 is father's gone just because his ones are little just for contentment just for austerity just for seclusion just because it is the very thing verily monks of these 5 who have gone to the forest he who has gone just because his ones are little for contentment for austerity for seclusion just because it is the very thing he of the 5 is topmost best foremost highest monks just as from the cow comes milk from milk cream from cream butter from butter ghee from ghee the skim of ghee there reckon topmost even so monks of these 5 forests gone he who has gone just because his ones are little for contentment for austerity for seclusion and just because it is the very thing he of the 5 is topmost best foremost highest elect so this utah is talking about people who go and live alone in the forest for various reasons but the best 1 is the last 1 and because he wants to cultivate himself his wants are little he is contented he wants to practice austerities and seclusion and that is the best reason the next suta is
